title: Touch up images -q processing
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Emulate the changes in https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2000 via @giuseppe 's suggestion.  Makes the images -q processing a bit neater.
